pipeline: full 1.78M / CPU TruncatedSVD + GPU Harmony n_pcs=20 / minibatch OT ref=200k
note: Full 1.78M epithelial integration. CPU TruncatedSVD avoided GPU PCA OOM. Harmony on 20-d (vs 50-d for other compartments, due to memory). OT uses ref_subsample=200k (potentially biased per minibatch caveat; cross-check with 500k subsample at full-kNN: p=1.0).
